emails.subject: RE: Straddle Problem
emails.body: Dan and Larry, I wanted to let you know that we have found out what the problem was regarding these deals. Tonight we will create new products in order for these deals to bridge correctly tomorrow. As a result, all straddle products should be captured correctly with two legs tomorrow. I apologize fro the inconvenience. Thanks TARA

emails.subject: RE: Straddle Problem
emails.body: Tara, It appears our EOL problem has not been resolved. According to Larry, his straddle products are not being booked correctly in TAGG. Specifically TAGG deal#Y99608.1 has only the call leg of the straddle. Would you please check into this and let Larry or myself know what we can do to resolve this issue. Thanks, Dan

emails.subject: RE: Straddle Problem
emails.body: Tara, It appears our EOL problem has not been resolved. According to Larry, his straddle products are not being booked correctly in TAGG. emails.subject: RE: Straddle Problem
emails.body: Tara, FYI Friday's and today's deals are now booked correctly. Thanks, Dan
